global_description: Small insect with a compact, oval body, predominantly yellow and black striped, covered in fine hairs. It has two pairs of transparent wings, six legs, and a pair of antennae. The head is equipped with compound eyes and a proboscis for feeding.

part_details.head: Small with compound eyes, antennae, and proboscis
part_details.body: Oval, yellow and black striped, covered in fine hairs

spatial_relations: Head at front, abdomen at rear
